settings.modal.protocolInfo: All providers use the OpenAI-compatible API protocol. Local servers (Ollama, LM Studio) and cloud providers are all supported.
settings.modal.apiEndpointHint: Leave empty for default provider URL. For local servers, use http://localhost:11434/v1
settings.modal.modelOptionalHint: Optional. You can choose the model in the Translation tab. This is just a default.
settings.modal.defaultModelHint: The model to use by default with this configuration
settings.modal.openrouterModelHint: Find the ID at openrouter.ai/models — You can use any model, even if it's not in the preset list!
settings.errorGoogleAIKey: This looks like a Google AI key (AIza...). OpenRouter requires its own API key. Get one at openrouter.ai
settings.errorModelRequired: Name and Model ID are required
settings.confirmDeleteKey: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
settings.hasSpecialChars: Warning: Key contains spaces or special characters
translate.title: Subtitle Translation
